title: Hanmulee Water Gun for Kids, High Capacity 850CC Quick-Filling Leak-Proof Water Pistols, Super Squirt Water Blaster Toy for Summer Swimming, Beach, Pool, Party, Water Fighting Toys for Children Adults
features: 💦Quick-Fill Design - Easily and quickly open the water outlet cover of the water gun, it can be filled with water within 1 second, and it is very convenient and quick to press the cover to automatically seal without leakage.

💦Super Value Fun - High capacity squirt guns and the shooting range is around 33 ft. Hold up to 850CC Water. Perfect summer water fight and family fun swimming pool and outdoor activity toys. These water gun blasters are excellent for a pool party, beach games and backyard events.

💦Safe and Durable - Made with durable thick plastic, ABS material can directly contact with kids’ skin and is proven to be 100% non-toxic and environmentally-friendly. The cool look and bright color squirt guns will bring endless fun for children at any children’s pool party or outdoor summer festivity.

💦One Step Squirt - Fill the water tank, pull the pump and start to shoot instantly. No need to pull trigger and get hands sore, super easy! Even 3-year-olds children can use it effortlessly. Easy to fill and operate!

💦New Play Form - You can add up to 0.5 liters crushed ice into the water gun for more fun. Imagine, though under the hot sun, you and your friends can not only feel the excitement of the water gun competition but also enjoy the happiness of ice water, adding a cool feeling to this hot summer.
